operation: First, a 10mm radius circle is drawn on the XY workplane and extruded 5mm vertically to form a lower cylindrical base. Next, a workplane is created on the top Z face of this cylinder, a 6-sided regular hexagon with 15mm diameter is drawn, and extruded 3mm vertically to form a raised hexagonal boss. All edges aligned parallel to the Z axis of this first feature are filleted with a 2mm radius. A second cylindrical feature is created by offsetting the XY workplane 20mm along the positive X axis, drawing a 5mm radius circle, extruding 8mm vertically, then filleting its topmost edge with a 1.5mm radius. Finally, the two separate features are combined into a single solid via a union operation.
geometry: The model is a single unified solid with two distinct raised sections sitting on a common flat bottom plane. The larger section is a stepped structure consisting of a wider cylindrical lower part topped with a regular hexagonal prism, with all vertical edges smoothly rounded. The smaller section is a short cylinder positioned horizontally offset from the larger section, with a smoothly rounded top circumferential edge.
function: This is a specialized mechanical fitting intended for use as a fastener or access cap, featuring a hexagonal head for standard wrench actuation, paired with an integrated adjacent locating pin to ensure correctly aligned installation and prevent unwanted rotation after mounting.
